qwiic_openlog_init.tooltip: Initialize Qwiic OpenLog data logger (I2C default address 0x2A)

qwiic_openlog_append.tooltip: Open specified file for appending (creates if not exists)

qwiic_openlog_print.tooltip: Write data to the currently open file (no newline)

qwiic_openlog_println.tooltip: Write data to the currently open file with newline

qwiic_openlog_sync.tooltip: Sync (flush) the currently open file to SD card

qwiic_openlog_mkdir.tooltip: Create specified directory on SD card
